name: zone-interface
description: Zone interfaces insert contact-like behavior between zone faces or between zones and other objects. They require creation commands plus interface-node properties for stiffness and strength.

notes: Choose stiffness high enough to limit penetration but not so high that the timestep becomes unnecessarily small.
Set tensile strength deliberately; zero tension is common for opening joints.
Available quantities vary by interface formulation and physics configuration.

common_patterns.name: Create interface on grouped faces
commands: zone interface create by-face range group 'Fault'
zone interface node property stiffness-normal 1e9 stiffness-shear 5e8 cohesion 1e4 friction 30 tension 0

validation_notes: Check interface node count and groups immediately after creation.
Verify normal direction and selected faces before assigning properties.
For coupled flow, set and inspect permeability behavior explicitly.
